title: Smoky Tunisian Meat Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic North African stew originating from the city of Tunis, typically cooked in a clay pot called a tagine. This recipe features ground meat and a blend of smoky spices.

ingredients.name: Smoky spice blend
ingredients.notes: Available at most spice stores or online

ingredients.name: Water or broth
ingredients.notes: Chicken or beef broth work well

instructions: Heat oil in the bottom of a clay pot or Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the ground meat and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until it is no longer pink, about 5 minutes.
Add the smoky spice blend, Tunisian chili paste, cumin, coriander, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Add the water or broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 30 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired.
